subcodes.first_line: The Trusted One hath appeared before the Countenance, and hath recalled thy mention. We have made mention of thee in this perspicuous Tablet. Hearken thou unto the call from the direction [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر الامین لدی الوجه و ذکرک ذکرناک بهذا اللوح المبین اسمع الندآء من شطر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for service, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
